free_text: Fast-neutron capture cross sections for indium,
Strength functions on figures for Nd,Sm,Er,Gd isotopes.
Separated isotopes of enrichment better than 95 %,
Liquid scintillation detector of 32 cm diameter
was used for capture events registration.
crystal was used for relative neutron flux measurement.
The s-, p-, d-wave neutron and radiative strength
functions were obtained from analysis of radiative
capture cross-sections by means of statistical
Errors in the data section are diagonal
elements of covariance matrix obtained in
MOMENTUM L 2-6 were moved from COMMON block of Subent
